deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "ERROR: DATABASE_URL is not set"; exit 1; fi && npx prisma db push --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss && npx tsx packages/database/seed.ts && if [ "$SERVICE" = "web" ]; then cd apps/web && exec npx next start -p 8080 -H 0.0.0.0; elif [ "$SERVICE" = "admin" ]; then cd apps/admin && exec npx next start -p 8080 -H 0.0.0.0; else cd apps/bot && exec node dist/index.js; fi'
